#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(std::span<uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor object from the buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Read the message_type
    uint16_t message_type;
    adaptor.read(&message_type, sizeof(message_type));

    // Skip the body data
    adaptor.skip(body_length);

    // Read the footer
    uint32_t footer;
    adaptor.read(&footer, sizeof(footer));

    // Return the MessageHeader
    return MessageHeader{message_type, body_length, footer};
}
